titleStmt.title: SII 10.308: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 308. (A.R. No. 243 of 1905.) ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME DARK ROOM. Ś. 1168. (Parābhava)

summary.p: States that Kōṭa Mummaḍi Pōtarāja gave 15 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti catussamudramudritanikhilavasuṁdharādharaparipālita śrīmatri
nayanapallavaprasādāsādita kriṣṇavēṇṇānadīdakṣiṇaṣaṭsahasragrāmāvanīvallabha
bhayalōbhadurlōbha cōḷacāḷukyasāmaṁttamadānēka pamrigēṁdra vibhavāma
rēṁdra śrīdhānyakaṭakapuravarādhīśvara pratāpalaṁkīśvara kavigaḷamogada vakaibēḍuvari
gaṁḍaragaṁḍa gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa jagameccugaṁḍa nannimā¨rttaṁḍa nāmādisamastapra
śastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kōṭa mummaḍipōtarājulu svasti śrīśu
bhaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1168 Agu nēṁṭi parābhavasaṁvatsara caitra śuddha 7
Ādivāramu viṣuvusaṁkrāṁttināṁḍu śrītripurāṁttaka śrīmahādē
varaku damataṁḍri cōḍrājunakuṁ damatalliṁ viṁjamadēvulakuṁ danatammuṁ
ḍu rājayakuṁ dha¨rmmuvugā nakhaṁḍadīpamuna kiccinamodavulu 15 go vīnive[tsa?]
muna kiccinamaṟturu Okkaṭi Underneathgaṇḍa-bhēruṇḍa.
Digital edition of SII 10.308 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
